title: A New Heart for the Company
article_text: A big bank recently has a new manager. He can manage a firm with a strong heart and a clear arm. His wife is pretty, and she works as an employee at the same bank. The source of their success is simply hard work. A cell phone on his desk rings fast every morning. This article discusses a new feature of the bank: foreign investment. A surprise factor can affect the market drop. We prepare for this change with sport and team meetings. Let's discuss this news with the employees. The company usually has a very fast growth rate.

image_prompts: A big modern bank building with a sign outside, a new manager standing at the entrance.
A man with a strong arm and a glowing heart shape on his chest, standing in an office.
A pretty woman smiling at a desk in a bank, wearing a name tag that says 'Employee'.
A glowing light bulb labeled 'Source' above two people working hard at a table.
A desk with a ringing cell phone, a clock showing early morning, and a 'Fast' label on the phone.
A newspaper article with a picture of a bank and a globe, the word 'Foreign' in the title.
A graph with a red arrow pointing down labeled 'Drop', and a question mark labeled 'Surprise Factor' next to it.
People in sportswear running and a group sitting in a meeting room with a 'Prepare' sign.
A manager talking to a group of employees around a table, with a 'Discuss' speech bubble.
A company logo with a rocket going up and a 'Fast Growth' label, with a calendar showing 'Usually'.
